    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="es">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>PAROS ANDON · ML2 · RAMAL 2</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.min.js"></script>
    <script>if(window.pdfjsLib)pdfjsLib.GlobalWorkerOptions.workerSrc='https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.worker.min.js';</script>
    <style>
    :root{
    --orange:#FF5A00;--orange-light:#FF7830;--orange-bg:rgba(255,90,0,0.08);--orange-border:rgba(255,90,0,0.3);
    --bg:#EDEDED;--bg-panel:#F7F7F7;--bg-card:#EFEFEF;--bg-input:#E5E5E5;
    --border:#DCDCDC;--border-dk:#C8C8C8;--text:#1A1A1A;--text2:#555;--text3:#999;
    --t103:#1A6FD4;--t102:#777;--t101:#1AAB5A;
    --shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);--shadow-lg:0 4px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.11);
    }
    *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
    body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;}
    .hdr{background:#1C1C1C;border-bottom:3px solid var(--orange);height:60px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 28px;
    position:sticky;top:0;z-index:300;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
    .hdr-l{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;}
    .badge{background:var(--orange);color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
    font-weight:900;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2.5px;padding:5px 14px 5px 10px;
    clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 8px) 0,100% 50%,calc(100% - 8px) 100%,0 100%);}
    .hdr-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:.5px;color:#fff;}
    .hdr-title em{color:var(--orange);font-style:normal;}
    .hdr-r{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;}
    .leg{display:flex;gap:14px;}
    .leg-i{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#999;}
    .leg-d{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:2px;}
    .leg-d.t103{background:var(--t103);}.leg-d.t102{background:var(--t102);}.leg-d.t101{background:var(--t101);}
    .wk-box{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#262626;border:1px solid #363636;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:3px;}
    .wk-box label{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;color:#888;}
    .wk-box select{background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:var(--orange);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:17px;cursor:pointer;appearance:none;}
    .wk-box select option{background:#222;color:#eee;}
    .ticker-top{position:sticky;top:60px;height:34px;background:#1E1E1E;border-bottom:2px solid var(--orange);
    display:flex;align-items:center;overflow:hidden;z-index:99;}
    .tk-top-lbl{background:#E03030;color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:10px;
    letter-spacing:.5px;padding:0 14px 0 10px;height:100%;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;white-space:nowrap;margin-right:10px;}
    .tk-track{flex:1;overflow:hidden;height:100%;}
    .tk-inner{display:flex;align-items:center;height:100%;white-space:nowrap;will-change:transform;}
    .tk-seg{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#CCC;padding:0 28px 0 0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;}
    .tk-lbl{color:#777;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-right:5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
    .tk-val{color:#EEE;font-weight:700;}
    .tk-val.verde{color:#1AAB5A;}.tk-val.naranja{color:#FF8C00;}.tk-val.rojo{color:#E03030;}
    .tk-c{color:var(--orange);font-weight:700;}
    .tk-sep{color:var(--orange);margin:0 8px;font-weight:900;}
    .tk-div{display:inline-block;width:2px;height:18px;background:var(--orange);opacity:.5;margin:0 20px;vertical-align:middle;}
    @keyframes tkMove{from{transform:translateX(0);}to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}
    .tabs-nav{display:flex;background:#1C1C1C;border-bottom:3px solid var(--orange);position:sticky;top:94px;z-index:98;overflow-x:auto;}
    .tab-btn{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;
    font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:#666;padding:10px 28px;background:transparent;border:none;cursor:pointer;
    border-bottom:3px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap;transition:all .2s;border-right:1px solid #2A2A2A;}
    .tab-btn .tab-icon{font-size:20px;line-height:1;}
    .tab-btn .tab-sub{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#444;margin-top:1px;}
    .tab-btn:hover{color:#CCC;background:#222;}
    .tab-btn.active{color:var(--orange);border-bottom-color:var(--orange);background:#1A1A1A;}
    .tab-btn.active .tab-sub{color:var(--orange);opacity:.7;}
    .tab-btn.locked{color:#444;}
    .tab-btn.locked .tab-icon{opacity:.4;}
    .tab-btn.locked .tab-sub{color:#333;}
    .tab-section{display:none;}
    .tab-section.active{display:block;}
    .main{padding:20px 28px 58px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
    .kpis{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;}
    .kpi{background:var(--bg-panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:3px solid var(--border-dk);padding:16px 20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
    .kpi.t103{border-top-color:var(--t103);}.kpi.t102{border-top-color:var(--t102);}.kpi.t101{border-top-color:var(--t101);}.kpi.tot{border-top-color:var(--orange);}
    .kpi-lbl{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:5px;}
    .kpi-val{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:38px;line-height:1;}
    .kpi.t103 .kpi-val{color:var(--t103);}.kpi.t102 .kpi-val{color:var(--t102);}.kpi.t101 .kpi-val{color:var(--t101);}.kpi.tot .kpi-val{color:var(--orange);}
    .kpi-extra{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:8px;}
    .sem-dot{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border-dk);}
    .sem-dot.verde{background:#1AAB5A;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(26,171,90,.6);}
    .sem-dot.naranja{background:#FF8C00;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(255,140,0,.6);}
    .sem-dot.rojo{background:#E03030;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(224,48,48,.6);}
    .kpi-coches{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text3);}
    .kpi-coches strong{color:var(--text2);font-size:18px;font-weight:900;}
    .kpi-name{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:6px;}
    .kpi-obj{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;}
    .panel{background:var(--bg-panel);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);padding:16px 20px;}
    .ph{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding-bottom:10px;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .pt{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text2);}
    .pt span{color:var(--orange);margin-right:5px;}
    .wk-pill{background:var(--orange-bg);border:1px solid var(--orange-border);color:var(--orange);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:2px;}
    .tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
    .tbl th{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);padding:7px 9px;text-align:right;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-dk);white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);}
    .tbl th:first-child,.tbl th:nth-child(2){text-align:left;}
    .tbl td{padding:6px 9px;text-align:right;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);vertical-align:middle;}
    .tbl td:first-child{text-align:left;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text3);}
    .tbl tfoot tr td{background:var(--bg-card);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;border-top:2px solid var(--border-dk);}
    .tbl tfoot tr td:first-child{color:var(--text2);}
    .tbl tr.gs td{border-top:2px solid var(--border-dk);}
    .tbl tr.gs td:first-child{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:900;color:var(--text);}
    .tbl input[type=number]{background:var(--bg-input);border:1px solid transparent;color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-size:13px;text-align:right;width:66px;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:2px;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .tbl input[type=number]:focus{border-color:var(--orange);background:#fff;}
    .v103{color:var(--t103)!important;font-weight:600!important;}
    .v102{color:var(--t102)!important;font-weight:600!important;}
    .v101{color:var(--t101)!important;font-weight:600!important;}
    .vtot{color:var(--orange)!important;font-weight:700!important;}
    .tp{display:inline-block;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:2px;}
    .tp.t103{background:rgba(26,111,212,.1);color:var(--t103);}
    .tp.t102{background:rgba(119,119,119,.1);color:var(--t102);}
    .tp.t101{background:rgba(26,171,90,.1);color:var(--t101);}
    .top5-tbl,.liga-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
    .top5-tbl th,.liga-tbl th{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);padding:7px 10px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-dk);background:var(--bg-card);white-space:nowrap;}
    .top5-tbl td,.liga-tbl td{padding:0 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:middle;}
    .top5-bar-cell,.liga-bar-cell{padding:8px 10px!important;}
    .top5-bar-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;}
    .top5-bar-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
    .top5-trk,.liga-trk{flex:1;background:var(--bg-card);height:12px;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);}
    .liga-trk{height:10px;}
    .top5-fill{height:100%;}
    .top5-fill.t103{background:var(--t103);}.top5-fill.t102{background:var(--t102);}.top5-fill.t101{background:var(--t101);}
    .liga-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--orange),var(--orange-light));}
    .liga-row-0 td{background:rgba(255,90,0,.05);}
    .liga-empty,.top5-empty{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;padding:28px 0;}
    .login-overlay{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:400px;padding:40px;}
    .login-box{background:var(--bg-panel);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);border-top:3px solid var(--orange);padding:32px 40px;width:100%;max-width:380px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
    .login-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .login-sub{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:24px;}
    .login-field{margin-bottom:16px;}
    .login-field label{display:block;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:6px;}
    .login-field input{width:100%;background:var(--bg-input);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;font-size:14px;padding:10px 12px;outline:none;border-radius:2px;transition:border-color .2s;}
    .login-field input:focus{border-color:var(--orange);}
    .login-error{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#E03030;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:12px;display:none;}
    .login-btn{width:100%;background:var(--orange);color:#fff;border:none;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
    .login-btn:hover{background:var(--orange-light);}
    .action-bar{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:14px 20px;background:#1C1C1C;border-bottom:2px solid var(--orange);margin-bottom:16px;}
    .btn-act{color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:9px 18px;transition:background .15s;}
    .btn-act.primary{background:var(--orange);clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 7px) 0,100% 50%,calc(100% - 7px) 100%,0 100%);}
    .btn-act.primary:hover{background:var(--orange-light);}
    .btn-act.blue{background:#1A6FD4;border:1px solid #2A7FE4;}
    .btn-act.blue:hover{background:#2A7FE4;}
    .btn-act.gray{background:#555;border:1px solid #777;}
    .btn-act.gray:hover{background:#666;}
    .btn-act.dark{background:#333;border:1px solid #555;}
    .btn-act.dark:hover{background:#444;}
    .btn-act.red{background:#E03030;border:1px solid #c02020;}
    .pdf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px;}
    .pdf-zone{background:var(--bg-panel);border:2px dashed var(--border-dk);border-radius:4px;padding:20px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s;cursor:pointer;}
    .pdf-zone:hover{border-color:var(--orange);background:var(--orange-bg);}
    .pdf-zone.has-file{border-color:var(--orange);border-style:solid;background:var(--orange-bg);}
    .pdf-zone-lbl{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .pdf-zone-lbl.t103{color:var(--t103);}.pdf-zone-lbl.t102{color:var(--t102);}.pdf-zone-lbl.t101{color:var(--t101);}
    .pdf-zone-sub{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:12px;}
    .pdf-zone input[type=file]{display:none;}
    .pdf-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text2);padding:8px 16px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;}
    .pdf-btn:hover{background:var(--orange);color:#fff;border-color:var(--orange);}
    .pdf-status{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:8px;min-height:16px;}
    .pdf-preview{background:var(--bg-panel);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:20px;margin-top:16px;display:none;}
    .pdf-preview.show{display:block;}
    .pdf-preview-ttl{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding-bottom:10px;}
    .pdf-preview-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;}
    .pdf-preview-col-hdr{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:14px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:2px 2px 0 0;}
    .pdf-preview-col-hdr.t103{background:rgba(26,111,212,.1);color:var(--t103);}
    .pdf-preview-col-hdr.t102{background:rgba(119,119,119,.1);color:var(--t102);}
    .pdf-preview-col-hdr.t101{background:rgba(26,171,90,.1);color:var(--t101);}
    .pdf-preview-actions{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:16px;justify-content:flex-end;}
    .btn-confirm{background:#1AAB5A;color:#fff;border:none;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:10px 20px;cursor:pointer;}
    .btn-cancel-pdf{background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:10px 20px;cursor:pointer;}
    .modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);z-index:500;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
    .modal-overlay.open{display:flex;}
    .pdf-del-btn{background:transparent;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#555;font-size:13px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:2px;transition:color .15s,background .15s;flex-shrink:0;}
    .pdf-del-btn:hover{color:#E03030;background:rgba(224,48,48,.1);}
    .pdf-folder-del{background:transparent;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#555;font-size:12px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:2px;transition:color .15s,background .15s;font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;margin-left:auto;}
    .pdf-folder-del:hover{color:#E03030;background:rgba(224,48,48,.1);}
    .pdf-view-btn{background:transparent;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#888;font-size:12px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:2px;transition:color .15s,background .15s;flex-shrink:0;}
    .pdf-view-btn:hover{color:var(--orange);background:var(--orange-bg);}
    #pdfViewerModal .modal{max-width:700px;}
    #pdfViewerContent{padding:0 24px 24px;}
    .modal{background:var(--bg-panel);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);border-top:3px solid var(--orange);width:100%;max-width:1100px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4);}
    .modal-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;background:var(--bg-panel);z-index:1;}
    .modal-ttl{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:1px;}
    .modal-ttl span{color:var(--orange);}
    .modal-close{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);color:var(--text2);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:6px 14px;cursor:pointer;}
    .modal-close:hover{background:var(--orange);color:#fff;border-color:var(--orange);}
    .modal-body{padding:20px 24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;}
    .modal-section-ttl{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
    .modal-kpis{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;}
    .modal-kpi{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:3px solid var(--border-dk);padding:14px 16px;}
    .modal-kpi.t103{border-top-color:var(--t103);}.modal-kpi.t102{border-top-color:var(--t102);}.modal-kpi.t101{border-top-color:var(--t101);}.modal-kpi.tot{border-top-color:var(--orange);}
    .modal-kpi-lbl{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:4px;}
    .modal-kpi-val{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:900;line-height:1;}
    .modal-kpi.t103 .modal-kpi-val{color:var(--t103);}.modal-kpi.t102 .modal-kpi-val{color:var(--t102);}.modal-kpi.t101 .modal-kpi-val{color:var(--t101);}.modal-kpi.tot .modal-kpi-val{color:var(--orange);}
    .modal-kpi-sub{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;}
    .toast{position:fixed;bottom:56px;right:24px;background:var(--bg-panel);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);border-left:4px solid var(--orange);padding:11px 18px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);transform:translateX(200px);opacity:0;transition:all .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);z-index:400;pointer-events:none;}
    .toast.show{transform:translateX(0);opacity:1;}
    .ticker-bot{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:38px;background:#1A1A1A;border-top:2px solid var(--orange);display:flex;align-items:center;overflow:hidden;z-index:200;}
    .ticker-bot .tk-lbl-box{background:var(--orange);color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:0 14px 0 10px;height:100%;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;white-space:nowrap;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 8px) 0,100% 50%,calc(100% - 8px) 100%,0 100%);margin-right:8px;}
    @keyframes crawlUp{0%{top:100%;opacity:1;}90%{opacity:1;}100%{top:-300%;opacity:0;}}
    /* Tooltip gráfica */
    #chartTooltip,#paradasTooltip{position:absolute;display:none;background:#1C1C1C;border:1px solid var(--orange);
    padding:6px 12px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#EEE;
    pointer-events:none;z-index:100;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px;height:5px;}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg);}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border-dk);border-radius:3px;}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--orange);}
    .festivo-btn{font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border-dk);background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text3);transition:all .15s;}
    .festivo-btn:hover{border-color:var(--orange);color:var(--orange);}
    .festivo-btn.active{background:#E03030;border-color:#c02020;color:#fff;}
    input[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,input[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none;}
    input[type=number]{-moz-appearance:textfield;}
    @media(max-width:700px){.kpis{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.main{padding:12px;}}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <header class="hdr">
    <div class="hdr-l">
    <div class="badge">SEAT · CUPRA</div>
    <div class="hdr-title">PAROS ANDON <em>·</em> ML2 · RAMAL 2</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hdr-r">
    <div class="leg">
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t103"></div><span style="color:var(--t103);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">103</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t102"></div><span style="color:var(--t102);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">102</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t101"></div><span style="color:var(--t101);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">101</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="wk-box">
    <label>SEMANA</label>
    <select id="wkSel"></select>
    </div>
    <button onclick="showYearModal()" style="background:#333;border:1px solid #555;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:9px 16px;">📊 AÑO</button>
    </div>
    </header>
    <div class="ticker-top">
    <div class="tk-top-lbl">COCHES PERDIDOS</div>
    <div class="tk-track"><div class="tk-inner" id="tkTop"></div></div>
    </div>
    <nav class="tabs-nav">
    <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchTab('dashboard')">
    <span class="tab-icon">📊</span><span>DASHBOARD</span><span class="tab-sub">KPIs · GRÁFICA · TOP 10</span>
    </button>
    <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('clasificaciones')">
    <span class="tab-icon">🏆</span><span>CLASIFICACIONES</span><span class="tab-sub">RANKING POR TURNO</span>
    </button>
    <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('paradas')">
    <span class="tab-icon">📋</span><span>PARADAS</span><span class="tab-sub">Nº PARADAS · PDF</span>
    </button>
    <button class="tab-btn locked" onclick="switchTab('datos')" id="tabDatos">
    <span class="tab-icon">🔒</span><span>ENTRADA DE DATOS</span><span class="tab-sub">LOGIN REQUERIDO</span>
    </button>
    </nav>
    <main class="main">
    <!-- ═══ DASHBOARD ═══ -->
    <div class="tab-section active" id="tab-dashboard">
    <div class="kpis">
    <div class="kpi t103">
    <div class="kpi-lbl"><span style="color:var(--t103);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">103</span></div>
    <div class="kpi-val" id="kv103">—</div>
    <div class="kpi-extra"><div class="sem-dot" id="sem103"></div><div class="kpi-coches" id="kc103">— coches</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-name" style="color:var(--t103)" id="kpiName103">FELIX</div>
    <div class="kpi-obj">OBJ. ≤ 5 min/sem</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi t102">
    <div class="kpi-lbl"><span style="color:var(--t102);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">102</span></div>
    <div class="kpi-val" id="kv102">—</div>
    <div class="kpi-extra"><div class="sem-dot" id="sem102"></div><div class="kpi-coches" id="kc102">— coches</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-name" style="color:var(--t102)" id="kpiName102">MANU</div>
    <div class="kpi-obj">OBJ. ≤ 5 min/sem</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi t101">
    <div class="kpi-lbl"><span style="color:var(--t101);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">101</span></div>
    <div class="kpi-val" id="kv101">—</div>
    <div class="kpi-extra"><div class="sem-dot" id="sem101"></div><div class="kpi-coches" id="kc101">— coches</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-name" style="color:var(--t101)" id="kpiName101">JOSÉ</div>
    <div class="kpi-obj">OBJ. ≤ 5 min/sem</div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi tot">
    <div class="kpi-lbl">TOTAL 3 TURNOS</div>
    <div class="kpi-val" id="kvtot">—</div>
    <div class="kpi-extra"><div class="sem-dot" id="semtot"></div><div class="kpi-coches" id="kctot">— coches</div></div>
    <div class="kpi-name" style="color:var(--orange)">TEMEZ</div>
    <div class="kpi-obj">OBJ. ≤ 15 min/sem</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Evolución anual — 53 semanas</div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
    <span id="annChartLastSaved" style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);background:rgba(255,90,0,0.08);border:1px solid var(--orange-border);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:2px;"></span>
    <div class="leg">
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t103"></div><span style="color:var(--t103);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">103</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t102"></div><span style="color:var(--t102);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">102</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t101"></div><span style="color:var(--t101);font-weight:900;font-size:115%">101</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- FIX: posición relativa para el tooltip -->
    <div id="chartTooltip"></div>
    <div style="position:relative;">
    <svg id="annSvg" style="width:100%;display:block;cursor:crosshair;" viewBox="0 0 1100 180"
    preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"
    onmousemove="chartHover(event,'annSvg','chartTooltip',chartPts,'min')"
    onmouseleave="chartLeave('chartTooltip')"></svg>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px 1fr;gap:16px;align-items:stretch;">
    <div class="panel" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="ph" style="width:100%;"><div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Distribución paros</div></div>
    <canvas id="pieChart" width="240" height="240" style="margin:10px auto;display:block;"></canvas>
    <div id="pieLegend" style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:11px;text-align:center;padding-bottom:8px;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
    <div class="ph"><div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Resumen diario por turno (min)</div></div>
    <table class="tbl" style="flex:1;">
    <thead><tr><th>Día</th><th style="text-align:right;color:var(--t103)" id="thName103">103</th><th style="text-align:right;color:var(--t102)" id="thName102">102</th><th style="text-align:right;color:var(--t101)" id="thName101">101</th><th>Total día</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="tsBody"></tbody>
    <tfoot><tr><td>TOTAL SEM.</td><td class="v103" id="st103">—</td><td class="v102" id="st102">—</td><td class="v101" id="st101">—</td><td class="vtot" id="stot">—</td></tr></tfoot>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Top 10 tactos — mayor paro semanal</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;">
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t103"></div><span style="color:var(--t103);font-weight:900">103</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t102"></div><span style="color:var(--t102);font-weight:900">102</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t101"></div><span style="color:var(--t101);font-weight:900">101</span></div>
    <div class="wk-pill" id="top5Pill">S01</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="top5Container"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Clasificación — todos los tactos</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;">
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t103"></div><span style="color:var(--t103);font-weight:900">103</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t102"></div><span style="color:var(--t102);font-weight:900">102</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t101"></div><span style="color:var(--t101);font-weight:900">101</span></div>
    <div class="wk-pill" id="ligaPill">S01</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="ligaContainer"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══ CLASIFICACIONES ═══ -->
    <div class="tab-section" id="tab-clasificaciones">
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="ph"><div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Clasificación por turno — semana</div><div class="wk-pill" id="turnoPill">S01</div></div>
    <div id="turnoClasContainer"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" style="margin-top:16px">
    <div class="ph"><div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Clasificación por turno — acumulado anual</div><div class="wk-pill" style="background:rgba(26,171,90,.08);border-color:rgba(26,171,90,.3);color:#1AAB5A">AÑO</div></div>
    <div id="turnoClasAnualContainer"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══ PARADAS ═══ -->
    <div class="tab-section" id="tab-paradas">
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Evolución anual de paradas</div>
    <div class="leg">
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t103"></div><span style="color:var(--t103);font-weight:900">103</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t102"></div><span style="color:var(--t102);font-weight:900">102</span></div>
    <div class="leg-i"><div class="leg-d t101"></div><span style="color:var(--t101);font-weight:900">101</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="paradasTooltip"></div>
    <div style="position:relative;">
    <svg id="paradasSvg" style="width:100%;display:block;cursor:crosshair;" viewBox="0 0 1100 180"
    preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"
    onmousemove="chartHover(event,'paradasSvg','paradasTooltip',paradasPts,'count')"
    onmouseleave="chartLeave('paradasTooltip')"></svg>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" style="margin-top:16px">
    <div class="ph"><div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Clasificación por número de paradas — semana</div><div class="wk-pill" id="paradasPill">S01</div></div>
    <div id="paradasContainer"><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:2px;font-size:12px;">SIN DATOS — SUBE LOS PDF EN ENTRADA DE DATOS</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══ DATOS (protegida) ═══ -->
    <div class="tab-section" id="tab-datos">
    <div id="loginSection" class="login-overlay">
    <div class="login-box">
    <div class="login-title">🔒 ACCESO RESTRINGIDO</div>
    <div class="login-sub">ENTRADA DE DATOS · ML2 · RAMAL 2</div>
    <div class="login-field"><label>USUARIO</label><input type="text" id="loginUser" placeholder="usuario" autocomplete="off"></div>
    <div class="login-field"><label>CONTRASEÑA</label><input type="password" id="loginPass" placeholder="••••••••"></div>
    <div class="login-error" id="loginError">Usuario o contraseña incorrectos</div>
    <button class="login-btn" onclick="doLogin()">ENTRAR</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="dataSection" style="display:none;">
    <div class="action-bar">
    <button class="btn-act gray" onclick="revertirSemana()" id="btnRevertir">↩ REVERTIR</button>
    <button class="btn-act primary" onclick="saveWeek()">◀ GUARDAR SEMANA</button>
    <button class="btn-act blue" onclick="toggleConfigPanel()">⚙ CONFIGURACIÓN</button>
    <button class="btn-act dark" onclick="doLogout()" style="margin-left:auto;">🔒 CERRAR SESIÓN</button>
    </div>
    <!-- ═══ PANEL CONFIGURACIÓN ═══ -->
    <div id="configPanel" style="display:none;">
    <div class="panel" style="margin-bottom:16px;border-top:3px solid #1A6FD4;">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span style="color:#1A6FD4">▶</span>Configuración — Nombres de turnos</div>
    <button onclick="saveConfig()" style="background:#1AAB5A;border:none;color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:7px 16px;cursor:pointer;">✓ GUARDAR TODO</button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;padding:4px 0 12px;">
    <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--t103);margin-bottom:6px;">TURNO 103</div>
    <input id="cfg_name103" type="text" placeholder="FELIX" style="width:100%;background:var(--bg-input);border:1px solid var(--t103);color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:16px;padding:8px 12px;outline:none;border-radius:2px;">
    </div>
    <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--t102);margin-bottom:6px;">TURNO 102</div>
    <input id="cfg_name102" type="text" placeholder="MANU" style="width:100%;background:var(--bg-input);border:1px solid var(--t102);color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:16px;padding:8px 12px;outline:none;border-radius:2px;">
    </div>
    <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--t101);margin-bottom:6px;">TURNO 101</div>
    <input id="cfg_name101" type="text" placeholder="JOSÉ" style="width:100%;background:var(--bg-input);border:1px solid var(--t101);color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:16px;padding:8px 12px;outline:none;border-radius:2px;">
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" style="margin-bottom:16px;border-top:3px solid #1A6FD4;">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span style="color:#1A6FD4">▶</span>Configuración — Tactos y atornilladores</div>
    <button onclick="addTactoRow()" style="background:var(--orange);border:none;color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:7px 16px;cursor:pointer;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 7px) 0,100% 50%,calc(100% - 7px) 100%,0 100%);">+ AÑADIR TACTO</button>
    </div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;" id="cfgTactoTable">
    <thead>
    <tr style="background:var(--bg-card);">
    <th style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);padding:8px 10px;text-align:left;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-dk);white-space:nowrap;">Nº TACTO</th>
    <th style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);padding:8px 10px;text-align:left;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-dk);">NOMBRE ATORNILLADOR</th>
    <th style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-dk);width:80px;">ACCIÓN</th>
    </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="cfgTactoBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="ph"><div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Importar datos desde PDF ANDON</div></div>
    <div class="pdf-grid">
    <div class="pdf-zone" id="pdfZone103" ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--t103)'" ondragleave="this.style.borderColor=''" ondrop="handlePDFDrop(event,103)">
    <div class="pdf-zone-lbl t103" id="pdfZoneLbl103">TURNO 103 · FELIX</div>
    <div class="pdf-zone-sub">ARRASTRA O SELECCIONA PDF</div>
    <input type="file" id="pdfFile103" accept=".pdf" onchange="processPDF(103,this)">
    <button class="pdf-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('pdfFile103').click()">📄 SELECCIONAR PDF</button>
    <div class="pdf-status" id="pdfStatus103"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pdf-zone" id="pdfZone102" ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--t102)'" ondragleave="this.style.borderColor=''" ondrop="handlePDFDrop(event,102)">
    <div class="pdf-zone-lbl t102" id="pdfZoneLbl102">TURNO 102 · MANU</div>
    <div class="pdf-zone-sub">ARRASTRA O SELECCIONA PDF</div>
    <input type="file" id="pdfFile102" accept=".pdf" onchange="processPDF(102,this)">
    <button class="pdf-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('pdfFile102').click()">📄 SELECCIONAR PDF</button>
    <div class="pdf-status" id="pdfStatus102"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pdf-zone" id="pdfZone101" ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--t101)'" ondragleave="this.style.borderColor=''" ondrop="handlePDFDrop(event,101)">
    <div class="pdf-zone-lbl t101" id="pdfZoneLbl101">TURNO 101 · JOSÉ</div>
    <div class="pdf-zone-sub">ARRASTRA O SELECCIONA PDF</div>
    <input type="file" id="pdfFile101" accept=".pdf" onchange="processPDF(101,this)">
    <button class="pdf-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('pdfFile101').click()">📄 SELECCIONAR PDF</button>
    <div class="pdf-status" id="pdfStatus101"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pdf-preview" id="pdfPreview">
    <div class="pdf-preview-ttl">PREVISUALIZACIÓN — REVISA ANTES DE CONFIRMAR</div>
    <div class="pdf-preview-grid" id="pdfPreviewGrid"></div>
    <div class="pdf-preview-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel-pdf" onclick="cancelPDF()">CANCELAR</button>
    <button class="btn-confirm" onclick="confirmPDF()">✓ CONFIRMAR E IMPORTAR</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" style="margin-top:16px;">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Días festivos / no trabajados — <span id="festivosSemLbl" style="color:var(--orange)">S01</span></div>
    <span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3)">Marca los días que NO se trabajen — no cuentan en la gráfica</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;padding:8px 0 4px;flex-wrap:wrap;" id="festivosBtns"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="wk-pill" id="wkPill">S01</div>
    </div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto;max-height:480px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <table class="tbl">
    <thead><tr><th>Tacto</th><th>Turno</th><th>Lunes</th><th>Martes</th><th>Miérc.</th><th>Jueves</th><th>Viernes</th><th>Total</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="tactoBody"></tbody>
    <tfoot id="tactoFoot"></tfoot>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" style="margin-top:16px;">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Seguimiento anual — 53 semanas (editable)</div>
    <span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3)">CLICK EN CELDA PARA EDITAR</span>
    </div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
    <table class="tbl" id="annTbl">
    <thead>
    <tr>
    <th>SEM</th>
    <th style="color:var(--t103)">103</th><th style="color:var(--t102)">102</th><th style="color:var(--t101)">101</th><th style="color:var(--orange)">TOTAL</th>
    <th style="color:var(--t103)">103</th><th style="color:var(--t102)">102</th><th style="color:var(--t101)">101</th><th style="color:var(--orange)">TOTAL</th>
    <th style="color:var(--t103)">103</th><th style="color:var(--t102)">102</th><th style="color:var(--t101)">101</th><th style="color:var(--orange)">TOTAL</th>
    </tr>
    <tr>
    <th></th>
    <th colspan="4" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text3)">S01 – S18</th>
    <th colspan="4" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text3)">S19 – S36</th>
    <th colspan="4" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text3)">S37 – S53</th>
    </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="annBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" style="margin-top:16px;">
    <div class="ph">
    <div class="pt"><span>▶</span>Historial de PDFs cargados</div>
    <button onclick="renderPDFHistory()" style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;">🔄 ACTUALIZAR</button>
    </div>
    <div id="pdfHistoryContainer" style="padding:12px;">
    <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);padding:10px;">Carga un PDF para ver el historial</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </main>
    <!-- PDF VIEWER MODAL -->
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="pdfViewerModal" onclick="closePDFViewer(event)">
    <div class="modal" style="max-width:700px;">
    <div class="modal-hdr">
    <div class="modal-ttl" id="pdfViewerTitle">PDF <span>DETALLE</span></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
    <button onclick="downloadPDFEntry()" style="background:#1A6FD4;border:none;color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;padding:7px 16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;" title="Descargar como PDF">⬇ DESCARGAR PDF</button>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closePDFViewer()">✕ CERRAR</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="pdfViewerContent" style="padding:20px 24px;"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="yearModal" onclick="closeYearModal(event)">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-hdr">
    <div class="modal-ttl">RESUMEN ANUAL <span>ACUMULADO</span> — ML2 · RAMAL 2</div>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeYearModal()">✕ CERRAR</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="yearModalBody"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ticker-bot">
    <div class="tk-lbl-box">CLASIFICACIÓN</div>
    <div class="tk-track"><div class="tk-inner" id="tkBot"></div></div>
    </div>
    <!-- FIREBASE -->
    <script type="module">
    import{initializeApp}from'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.0/firebase-app.js';
    import{getFirestore,doc,setDoc,getDoc,onSnapshot}from'https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.14.0/firebase-firestore.js';
    const app=initializeApp({apiKey:"AIzaSyBfz8Zvwxzb4NKYEl_UB7LTm0JUtcFOfxg",authDomain:"paros-andon.firebaseapp.com",projectId:"paros-andon",storageBucket:"paros-andon.firebasestorage.app",messagingSenderId:"72773555727",appId:"1:72773555727:web:8f3f0e3b35f40e8500357a"});
    const db=getFirestore(app);
    const REF=doc(db,'dashboard','paros-andon-ml2');
    window.fbSave=async p=>{try{await setDoc(REF,p,{merge:true});}catch(e){console.error(e);}};
    window.fbLoad=async()=>{try{const s=await getDoc(REF);if(s.exists())return s.data();}catch(e){console.error(e);}return null;};
    window.fbListen=cb=>onSnapshot(REF,s=>{if(s.exists())cb(s.data());});
    </script>
    <script>
    /* ══ CONSTANTES ══ */
    const DAYS=['Lunes','Martes','Miércoles','Jueves','Viernes'];
    // TACTOS y TN_MAP gestionados por CFG (ver sección CONFIGURACIÓN EDITABLE)
    // getTACTOS() y getTN() son los helpers que usan CFG dinámicamente
    const WEEKS=53, TAKT=1.12;
    const PRELOAD_ANN={7:{t103:5.16,t102:0.24,t101:8.42},8:{t103:6.55,t102:0.38,t101:8.05},9:{t103:9.06,t102:0.25,t101:7.53},10:{t103:7.31,t102:0.38,t101:8.21},11:{t103:11.36,t102:0.19,t101:6.33}};
    const PRELOAD_TACTO={12:{207:{t103:[0,0.01,0.02,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0,0,0,0]},211:{t103:[1.18,0.07,0.06,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0.15,0,0,0]},212:{t103:[0.21,0,0.03,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0.04,0.1,0.1,0,0]},213:{t103:[0,0.32,0,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0.14,0,0,0]},214:{t103:[0,0.06,0.22,0,0],t102:[0,0,0.02,0,0],t101:[0.07,0,0.01,0,0]},215:{t103:[0.28,0.07,0.03,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0.02,0.07,0.09,0,0]},217:{t103:[0.08,0.1,0.06,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0.13,0.17,0.09,0,0]},218:{t103:[0.04,0.1,0,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0.18,0.02,0.03,0,0]},219:{t103:[0.01,0.02,0.08,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0.06,0.17,0.08,0,0]},220:{t103:[0,0,0,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0.01,0,0.02,0,0]},227:{t103:[0,0,0,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0.08,0.01,0,0]},230:{t103:[0.15,0.14,0.01,0,0],t102:[0,0.08,0.19,0,0],t101:[0.05,0.02,0,0,0]},233:{t103:[0.09,0,0,0,0],t102:[0.02,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0,0,0,0]},234:{t103:[0,0.03,0.03,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0.02,0.02,0,0]},236:{t103:[0.09,0.18,0,0,0],t102:[0.05,0,0,0,0],t101:[0.01,0.05,0.18,0,0]}}};
    let data={},annData={},curWeek=12;
    // Cache de puntos de las gráficas para el tooltip
    let chartPts=[], paradasPts=[];
    /* ══ CONFIGURACIÓN EDITABLE ══ */
    // Valores por defecto — se sobreescriben con lo guardado en Firebase/localStorage
    let CFG={
    names:{t103:'FELIX',t102:'MANU',t101:'JOSÉ'},
    tactos:[...([207,211,212,213,214,215,217,218,219,220,221,227,230,233,234,236,243,246])],
    tnMap:{207:'SOP.MASTER ABS',211:'SOP.MASTER CARR.',212:'ESTRIBO CAPO',213:'CINT.ANT.DCH/AIRBAG IZQ',214:'CINT.ANT.IZQ/AIRBAG DCH',215:'MOTOR LIMPIA',217:'MASAS LARG.IZQ/H.MOTOR',218:'MASA BORNE/T.FRENO SUP',219:'TUBOS FRENO INF',220:'MASA BAT.PISO',221:'GRC802Y',227:'TRANSF.BATERIA',230:'CONSOLA MOTOR',233:'ANILLA CARGA DCH/MASA CONS',234:'TIRANTE CONS/CINT.ANT.IZQ',236:'ANILLA CARGA IZQ/CINT.DCH',243:'SDMS GRCZP6A',246:'GRCZP6A'}
    };
    function applyCFG(){
    ['103','102','101'].forEach(t=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(`kpiName${t}`);
    if(el)el.textContent=CFG.names[`t${t}`]||t;
    const lbl=document.getElementById(`pdfZoneLbl${t}`);
    if(lbl)lbl.textContent=`TURNO ${t} · ${CFG.names[`t${t}`]||t}`;
    const th=document.getElementById(`thName${t}`);
    if(th)th.textContent=`${t}·${CFG.names[`t${t}`]||t}`;
    });
    if(document.getElementById('tactoBody')&&document.getElementById('tactoBody').children.length>0){
    document.getElementById('tactoBody').innerHTML='';
    document.getElementById('tactoFoot').innerHTML='';
    buildTacto();
    }
    }
    function loadCFG(saved){
    if(!saved)return;
    try{
    const c=typeof saved==='string'?JSON.parse(saved):saved;
    if(c.names)CFG.names={...CFG.names,...c.names};
    if(c.tactos&&Array.isArray(c.tactos)&&c.tactos.length>0)CFG.tactos=c.tactos.map(Number);
    if(c.tnMap)CFG.tnMap={...CFG.tnMap,...c.tnMap};
    }catch(e){}
    }
    function getTACTOS(){return CFG.tactos;}
    function getTN(t){return CFG.tnMap[t]?`${t}·${CFG.tnMap[t]}`:String(t);}
    function getTurnName(key){return CFG.names[key]||key.replace('t','T');}
    function toggleConfigPanel(){
    const p=document.getElementById('configPanel');
    if(p.style.display==='none'){
    p.style.display='block';
    renderCfgInputs();
    }else{
    p.style.display='none';
    }
    }
    function renderCfgInputs(){
    // Nombres de turnos
    ['103','102','101'].forEach(t=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(`cfg_name${t}`);
    if(el)el.value=CFG.names[`t${t}`]||'';
    });
    // Tabla de tactos
    renderCfgTactos();
    }
    function renderCfgTactos(){
    const tbody=document.getElementById('cfgTactoBody');if(!tbody)return;
    tbody.innerHTML='';
    CFG.tactos.forEach((tacto,i)=>{
    const tr=document.createElement('tr');
    tr.style.borderBottom='1px solid var(--border)';
    tr.innerHTML=`
    <td style="padding:6px 10px;">
    <input type="number" value="${tacto}" min="1" max="999" onchange="cfgUpdateTactoNum(${i},this.value)"
    style="width:80px;background:var(--bg-input);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:15px;padding:5px 8px;outline:none;text-align:center;">
    </td>
    <td style="padding:6px 10px;">
    <input type="text" value="${CFG.tnMap[tacto]||''}" placeholder="Nombre del atornillador" onchange="cfgUpdateTactoName(${tacto},this.value)"
    style="width:100%;background:var(--bg-input);border:1px solid var(--border-dk);color:var(--text);font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:13px;padding:5px 10px;outline:none;">
    </td>
    <td style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;">
    <button onclick="cfgDeleteTacto(${i})"
    style="background:#E03030;border:none;color:#fff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:5px 12px;cursor:pointer;">
    🗑 ELIMINAR
    </button>
    </td>`;
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
    });
    }
    function cfgUpdateTactoNum(index,newVal){
    const n=parseInt(newVal);if(isNaN(n)||n<1)return;
    const old=CFG.tactos[index];
    // Mover el nombre si existía
    if(CFG.tnMap[old]&&!CFG.tnMap[n])CFG.tnMap[n]=CFG.tnMap[old];
    if(old!==n)delete CFG.tnMap[old];
    CFG.tactos[index]=n;
    CFG.tactos.sort((a,b)=>a-b);
    renderCfgTactos();
    }
    function cfgUpdateTactoName(tacto,name){
    CFG.tnMap[tacto]=name.trim();
    }
    function cfgDeleteTacto(index){
    const t=CFG.tactos[index];
    if(!confirm(`¿Eliminar el tacto ${t}·${CFG.tnMap[t]||''}?\nSe eliminarán también sus datos de todas las semanas.`))return;
    delete CFG.tnMap[t];
    CFG.tactos.splice(index,1);
    // Eliminar datos de ese tacto
    for(let w=1;w<=WEEKS;w++){if(data[w])delete data[w][t];}
    renderCfgTactos();
    showToast(`🗑 Tacto ${t} eliminado`);
    }
    function addTactoRow(){
    // Buscar número libre
    let newNum=300;
    while(CFG.tactos.includes(newNum))newNum++;
    CFG.tactos.push(newNum);
    CFG.tactos.sort((a,b)=>a-b);
    // Inicializar datos para todas las semanas
    for(let w=1;w<=WEEKS;w++){
    if(!data[w])data[w]={};
    data[w][newNum]={t103:[0,0,0,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0,0,0,0]};
    }
    renderCfgTactos();
    showToast(`✚ Tacto ${newNum} añadido — edita su número y nombre`);
    }
    function saveConfig(){
    // Leer nombres de inputs
    ['103','102','101'].forEach(t=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(`cfg_name${t}`);
    if(el&&el.value.trim())CFG.names[`t${t}`]=el.value.trim().toUpperCase();
    });
    // Leer nombres de atornilladores desde los inputs de la tabla
    document.querySelectorAll('#cfgTactoBody tr').forEach((tr,i)=>{
    const numInput=tr.querySelector('input[type=number]');
    const nameInput=tr.querySelector('input[type=text]');
    if(numInput&&nameInput){
    const t=parseInt(numInput.value);
    if(!isNaN(t))CFG.tnMap[t]=nameInput.value.trim();
    }
    });
    // Guardar en localStorage y Firebase
    const cfgStr=JSON.stringify(CFG);
    localStorage.setItem('paros_cfg',cfgStr);
    if(window.fbSave)window.fbSave({config:cfgStr});
    // Aplicar cambios
    applyCFG();
    // Reconstruir tabla de tactos con nuevos datos
    document.getElementById('tactoBody').innerHTML='';
    document.getElementById('tactoFoot').innerHTML='';
    buildTacto();renderTacto();renderTS();updateKPIs();renderTurnoClas();renderTurnoClasAnual();renderTop5();renderLiga();renderParadas();
    showToast('✓ Configuración guardada y aplicada');
    }
    /* ══ HELPERS ══ */
    function msToSec(v){if(!v)return 0;const m=Math.floor(v);const s=Math.round((v-m)*100);return m*60+s;}
    function secToMs(s){if(!s)return 0;const m=Math.floor(s/60);const sc=Math.round(s%60);return parseFloat((m+sc/100).toFixed(2));}
    function semColor(v){return v<1?'verde':v<5?'naranja':'rojo';}
    function setSem(id,v){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(!el)return;el.className='sem-dot'+(v>0?' '+semColor(v):'');}
    function cochesStr(v){return v>0?`<strong>${Math.round(msToSec(v)/60/TAKT)}</strong> coches perd.`:'— coches';}
    function showToast(msg){const el=document.getElementById('toast');el.textContent=msg;el.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('show'),2800);}
    function setWkPills(){['wkPill','top5Pill','ligaPill','turnoPill','paradasPill'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent=`S${String(curWeek).padStart(2,'0')}`;});}
    function fixKeys(obj){
    const r={};Object.entries(obj).forEach(([w,val])=>{const wi=parseInt(w);if(typeof val==='object'&&val!==null&&!Array.isArray(val)){r[wi]={};Object.entries(val).forEach(([t,v])=>{r[wi][parseInt(t)]=v;});}else r[wi]=val;});return r;
    }
    // FIX: función central que devuelve los valores de una semana (segundos)
    // Excluye días festivos — no arrastra ceros de días no trabajados
    function weekSecs(w){
    let s3=0,s2=0,s1=0;
    const festivos=window._festivosData?.[w]||[];
    getTACTOS().forEach(t=>DAYS.forEach((_,di)=>{
    if(festivos.includes(di))return; // día festivo → no contar
    s3+=msToSec(data[w]?.[t]?.t103?.[di]||0);
    s2+=msToSec(data[w]?.[t]?.t102?.[di]||0);
    s1+=msToSec(data[w]?.[t]?.t101?.[di]||0);
    }));
    if(s3+s2+s1===0&&annData[w]){
    s3=msToSec(annData[w].t103||0);
    s2=msToSec(annData[w].t102||0);
    s1=msToSec(annData[w].t101||0);
    }
    return{s3,s2,s1};
    }
    /* ══ FESTIVOS ══ */
    function initFestivos(){
    if(!window._festivosData)window._festivosData={};
    }
    function renderFestivoBtns(){
    const container=document.getElementById('festivosBtns');
    const lbl=document.getElementById('festivosSemLbl');
    if(!container)return;
    if(lbl)lbl.textContent=`S${String(curWeek).padStart(2,'0')}`;
    const festivos=window._festivosData?.[curWeek]||[];
    container.innerHTML=DAYS.map((d,di)=>`
    <button class="festivo-btn${festivos.includes(di)?' active':''}"
    onclick="toggleFestivo(${di})"
    title="${festivos.includes(di)?'Click para quitar festivo':'Click para marcar festivo'}">
    ${festivos.includes(di)?'🚫':''} ${di+1}·${d.toUpperCase()}${festivos.includes(di)?' — FESTIVO':''}
    </button>`).join('');
    }
    function toggleFestivo(di){
    if(!window._festivosData)window._festivosData={};
    if(!window._festivosData[curWeek])window._festivosData[curWeek]=[];
    const arr=window._festivosData[curWeek];
    const idx=arr.indexOf(di);
    if(idx>=0){arr.splice(idx,1);showToast(`✓ ${DAYS[di]} S${String(curWeek).padStart(2,'0')} — día normal`);}
    else{arr.push(di);showToast(`🚫 ${DAYS[di]} S${String(curWeek).padStart(2,'0')} marcado como festivo`);}
    if(arr.length===0)delete window._festivosData[curWeek];
    renderFestivoBtns();
    // Actualizar gráfica y KPIs con el cambio
    drawChart();drawParadasChart();updateKPIs();renderTS();renderTop5();renderLiga();
    persist();
    }
    /* ══ SEMANA DE VISUALIZACIÓN DE LA GRÁFICA ══
    Regla estricta:
    - Semanas con datos en annData (preloaded S7-S11, o editadas manualmente)
    se consideran SIEMPRE completas.
    - Semanas con datos en data[] (tactos por día): completa = tiene datos
    en el último día trabajado (último di no festivo).
    - Mientras S15 no tenga su último día volcado → gráfica se queda en S14.
    */
    function calcChartWeek(){
    let lastComplete=0;
    for(let w=1;w<=WEEKS;w++){
    // Semanas con annData → siempre completas
    if(annData[w]&&(annData[w].t103||annData[w].t102||annData[w].t101)){
    lastComplete=w;continue;
    }
    // Semanas con datos precargados (PRELOAD_TACTO) → siempre completas
    if(PRELOAD_TACTO[w]){lastComplete=w;continue;}
    // Semanas con datos por tacto → comprobar último día trabajado
    const festivos=window._festivosData?.[w]||[];
    let lastDia=-1;
    for(let di=4;di>=0;di--){if(!festivos.includes(di)){lastDia=di;break;}}
    if(lastDia===-1)continue;
    const wd=data[w]||{};
    let tieneUltimoDia=false;
    for(const t of getTACTOS()){
    const td=wd[t];if(!td)continue;
    if((td.t103?.[lastDia]||0)>0||(td.t102?.[lastDia]||0)>0||(td.t101?.[lastDia]||0)>0){
    tieneUltimoDia=true;break;
    }
    }
    if(tieneUltimoDia)lastComplete=w;
    }
    return lastComplete>0?lastComplete:1;
    }
    /* ══ DATA ══ */
    function initData(){
    // Cargar configuración primero
    const cfgSaved=localStorage.getItem('paros_cfg');
    if(cfgSaved)loadCFG(cfgSaved);
    const s=localStorage.getItem('paros_v3');
    if(s){try{
    const p=JSON.parse(s);
    data=fixKeys(p.data||{});annData=fixKeys(p.annData||{});
    if(p.curWeek)curWeek=p.curWeek;
    if(p.paradasData)window._paradasData=fixKeys(p.paradasData);
    if(p.festivosData){try{window._festivosData=JSON.parse(typeof p.festivosData==='string'?p.festivosData:JSON.stringify(p.festivosData));}catch(e){window._festivosData=p.festivosData||{};}}
    if(p.pdfHistory){
    const ph=p.pdfHistory||{};window._pdfHistory={};
    ['felix','manu','jose'].forEach(k=>{
    if(!ph[k])return;
    if(Array.isArray(ph[k])){window._pdfHistory[k]={};ph[k].forEach(e=>{const wk=e.week||'S??';if(!window._pdfHistory[k][wk])window._pdfHistory[k][wk]=[];window._pdfHistory[k][wk].push({filename:e.filename,date:e.date,tactos:e.tactos});});}
    else{window._pdfHistory[k]=ph[k];}
    });
    }
    }catch(e){}}
    for(let w=1;w<=WEEKS;w++){
    if(!data[w])data[w]={};
    getTACTOS().forEach(t=>{
    const pre=PRELOAD_TACTO[w]?.[t];
    if(!data[w][t]){data[w][t]=pre?{t103:[...pre.t103],t102:[...pre.t102],t101:[...pre.t101]}:{t103:[0,0,0,0,0],t102:[0,0,0,0,0],t101:[0,0,0,0,0]};}
    else if(pre){const hd=['t103','t102','t101'].some(k=>data[w][t][k]?.some(v=>v>0));if(!hd)data[w][t]={t103:[...pre.t103],t102:[...pre.t102],t101:[...pre.t101]};}
    });
    if(PRELOAD_ANN[w])annData[w]={...PRELOAD_ANN[w]};
    else if(!annData[w])annData[w]={t103:null,t102:null,t101:null};
    }
    }
    function persist(){
    localStorage.setItem('paros_v3',JSON.stringify({data,annData,curWeek,paradasData:window._paradasData||{},pdfHistory:window._pdfHistory||{},festivosData:window._festivosData||{}}));
    if(window.fbSave)window.fbSave({data:JSON.stringify(data),annData:JSON.stringify(annData),curWeek,paradasData:JSON.stringify(window._paradasData||{}),pdfHistory:JSON.stringify(window._pdfHistory||{}),festivosData:JSON.stringify(window._festivosData||{})});
    }
    async function loadFromFirebase(){
    if(!window.fbLoad)return false;
    const r=await window.fbLoad();if(!r)return false;
    try{
    if(r.config){loadCFG(r.config);localStorage.setItem('paros_cfg',r.config);}
    if(r.data){const d=JSON.parse(r.data);if(d&&Object.keys(d).length>0)data=fixKeys(d);}
    if(r.annData){const a=JSON.parse(r.annData);if(a&&Object.keys(a).length>0)annData=fixKeys(a);}
    if(r.curWeek)curWeek=r.curWeek;
    if(r.paradasData){try{window._paradasData=fixKeys(JSON.parse(r.paradasData));}catch(e){}}
    if(r.festivosData){try{window._festivosData=JSON.parse(r.festivosData);}catch(e){}}
    if(r.pdfHistory){try{window._pdfHistory=JSON.parse(r.pdfHistory);}catch(e){}}
    return true;
    }catch(e){return false;}
    }
    /* ══ WEEK SELECTOR ══ */
    function buildSel(){
    const s=document.getElementById('wkSel');
    for(let w=1;w<=WEEKS;w++){const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=w;o.textContent=`S${String(w).padStart(2,'0')}`;s.appendChild(o);}
    s.value=curWeek;
    }
    function changeWeek(w){
    curWeek=w;setWkPills();
    renderFestivoBtns();buildTS();
    renderTacto();renderTS();updateKPIs();renderTurnoClas();renderTurnoClasAnual();renderTop5();renderLiga();renderAnnTable();renderParadas();drawPieChart();
    }
    /* ══ getTACTOS() TABLE ══ */
    function buildTacto(){
    const tbody=document.getElementById('tactoBody');
    getTACTOS().forEach(tacto=>{
    ['t103','t102','t101'].forEach((trn,ti2)=>{
    const tr=document.createElement('tr');
    if(ti2===0)tr.classList.add('gs');
    const lbl=trn==='t103'?'T103':trn==='t102'?'T102':'T101';
    tr.innerHTML=`
    <td style="white-space:nowrap">${ti2===0?`<span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-weight:900;font-size:14px">${tacto}</span><br><span style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed';font-size:9px;color:var(--text3)">${TN_MAP[tacto]||''}</span>`:'&nbsp;'}</td>
    <td><span class="tp ${trn}">${lbl}</span></td>
    ${DAYS.map((_,di)=>`<td><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" id="tc_${tacto}_${trn}_${di}" onchange="onTC(${tacto})" oninput="onTC(${tacto})" placeholder="—"></td>`).join('')}
    <td class="v${trn.slice(1)}" id="tc_tot_${tacto}_${trn}">—</td>`;
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
    });
    });
    document.getElementById('tactoFoot').innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="2">TOTAL SEMANA</td>${DAYS.map((_,di)=>`<td class="vtot" id="tf_${di}">—</td>`).join('')}<td class="vtot" id="tf_tot">—</td></tr>`;
    }
    function renderTacto(){
    getTACTOS().forEach(tacto=>{
    ['t103','t102','t101'].forEach(trn=>{
    const vals=data[curWeek]?.[tacto]?.[trn]||[0,0,0,0,0];
    let s=0;
    DAYS.forEach((_,di)=>{const el=document.getElementById(`tc_${tacto}_${trn}_${di}`);if(el)el.value=vals[di]>0?vals[di]:'';s+=msToSec(vals[di]||0);});
    const te=document.getElementById(`tc_tot_${tacto}_${trn}`);if(te)te.textContent=s>0?secToMs(s).toFixed(2):'—';
    });
    });
    updateFoot();
    }
    function onTC(tacto){
    ['t103','t102','t101'].forEach(trn=>{
    let s=0;
    DAYS.forEach((_,di)=>{const v=parseFloat(document.getElementById(`tc_${tacto}_${trn}_${di}`)?.value)||0;data[curWeek][tacto][trn][di]=v;s+=msToSec(v);});
    const te=document.getElementById(`tc_tot_${tacto}_${trn}`);if(te)te.textContent=s>0?secToMs(s).toFixed(2):'—';
    });
    updateFoot();renderTS();updateKPIs();renderTop5();renderLiga();drawChart();
    }
    function updateFoot(){
    let grand=0;
    DAYS.forEach((_,di)=>{
    let dt=0;getTACTOS().forEach(t=>['t103','t102','t101'].forEach(trn=>{dt+=msToSec(data[curWeek]?.[t]?.[trn]?.[di]||0);}));
    grand+=dt;const el=document.getElementById(`tf_${di}`);if(el)el.textContent=dt>0?secToMs(dt).toFixed(2):'—';
    });
    const te=document.getElementById('tf_tot');if(te)te.textContent=grand>0?secToMs(grand).toFixed(2):'—';
    }
    /* ══ TURNO SUMMARY ══ */
    function buildTS(){
    const festivos=window._festivosData?.[curWeek]||[];
    document.getElementById('tsBody').innerHTML=DAYS.map((d,di)=>{
    const esF=festivos.includes(di);
    return`<tr${esF?' style="opacity:.45"':''}><td>${d}${esF?' <span style="font-family:\'Barlow Condensed\';font-size:9px;color:#E03030;letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:700">FESTIVO</span>':''}</td><td class="v103" id="ts103_${di}">—</td><td class="v102" id="ts102_${di}">—</td><td class="v101" id="ts101_${di}">—</td><td class="vtot" id="tst_${di}">—</td></tr>`;
    }).join('');
    }
    function renderTS(){
    let g3=0,g2=0,g1=0;
    DAYS.forEach((_,di)=>{
    let s3=0,s2=0,s1=0;
    getTACTOS().forEach(t=>{s3+=msToSec(data[curWeek]?.[t]?.t103?.[di]||0);s2+=msToSec(data[curWeek]?.[t]?.t102?.[di]||0);s1+=msToSec(data[curWeek]?.[t]?.t101?.[di]||0);});
    const f=v=>v>0?v.toFixed(2):'—';
    document.getElementById(`ts103_${di}`).textContent=f(secToMs(s3));
    document.getElementById(`ts102_${di}`).textContent=f(secToMs(s2));
    document.getElementById(`ts101_${di}`).textContent=f(secToMs(s1));
    document.getElementById(`tst_${di}`).textContent=f(secToMs(s3+s2+s1));
    g3+=s3;g2+=s2;g1+=s1;
    });
    const f=v=>v>0?v.toFixed(2):'—';
    document.getElementById('st103').textContent=f(secToMs(g3));
    document.getElementById('st102').textContent=f(secToMs(g2));
    document.getElementById('st101').textContent=f(secToMs(g1));
    document.getElementById('stot').textContent=f(secToMs(g3+g2+g1));
    }
    /* ══ KPIs ══ */
    function updateKPIs(){
    const{s3,s2,s1}=weekSecs(curWeek);
    const t3=secToMs(s3),t2=secToMs(s2),t1=secToMs(s1),tot=secToMs(s3+s2+s1);
    const f=v=>v>0?v.toFixed(2):'—';
    const SC={verde:'#1AAB5A',naranja:'#FF8C00',rojo:'#E03030'};
    const gc=(v,def)=>v>0?SC[semColor(v)]:def;
    document.getElementById('kv103').textContent=f(t3);document.getElementById('kv103').style.color=gc(t3,'var(--t103)');
    View remainder of file in raw view
